name: Australian Jack
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in the water.
4. Add the dissolved baking soda to the butter mixture, stirring well.
5. Gradually add the oatmeal and ginger, mixing until a firm dough forms. If needed, add a little more oatmeal.
6. Knead the dough lightly on a floured surface.
7. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
8. Press the dough into a buttered baking dish measuring approximately 8 x 12 inches. The dough should be about half an inch thick.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until brown on top.
10. Cut into squares while hot.
